title: scrophularia verticillata
intro: Scrophularia verticillata, also known as Bastard Toadflax or Button Wort, is a perennial plant belonging to the figwort family, native to Europe and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The plant has been used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Scrophularia verticillata, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, are often used to support the body's natural healing processes and promote overall well-being.
